stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

You have completed your evaluation of the first video game.

Press any key to proceed to the second game.

emergency_text: The blue color can be watched because its screen go full black so i cant capture it.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"This one was pretty creative, because it shows 4 different enemies with their own patters, the music as the center of the concept shows the way to capture everyone.","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"This game was original because the way to complete the game was creative, at the start i was thinking that the game was like a pacman, and after watching that i had to feed every enemy with different stategys i was pretty surprised.","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"The concept worked pretty good, the gameplay has few flaws, the game was broken, one of the four enemies had its part of the screen bugged, so after \"feeding\" the other three enemies, the blue screen got so black, so i failed to finished it because i wasn able to see it. The game has few enjoyable mechanics, like feeding following the music, avoiding bullets and repeting few time the formula, its pretty interesting because if you had only to feed one time, you can basically try \"test and error\" all time to fulfill the game, but with that system of feeding 4-5 times you have to learn the pattern. The most frustating thing was that few of the enemies needed more time to feed them, because it was like 0.1s to do it right, it needed more time.","attention-check":3,"authenticity-rating":1,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think this game was authentic, i have played many rythm games and this concept was pretty original, the intention of the game was capturing those enemies (even if the game call them thieft o something like that for the player is like killing enemies that make sounds). The effort to create different patterns for the enemies are good, there are a main menu, with the lore and controls of the game, and then a scene with 4 different enemies."}

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"The main mechanic about changing the light and recovery system was pretty creative because you had to use everything to fulfill the quest.","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"This game feel original, because at the start i wasnt expecting that i can change the light position/angle, after few tries i was failing with the last delivery until i learn about chaning that, and when i touched it i was surprised. I think that this concept about hidding in the blue sections is original because your character recovers its health at those places, you can avoid them because if you fail one delivery you have to restart, so thinking about where you are and your next \"safe zone\" its vital.","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"I think that the game punish the player so much because it allows to complete the map with different ways but if you try something and it didnt work you have to start again, and completing the same objetives because you tried something with the last delivery its frustating, it was basically pixel perfect.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"This game was creative and worked well, but it wasnt very authentic, most of the \"spy\" or stealth games have similar mechics, the original part of this one was the system to change the light position, allowing creating new \"bridges\" to complete the objetive, pretty similar with the puzzles of the very last Legend of Zeldas from Switch. The effort to develop this idea its good, maybe not the hardest prototype to develop but still interesting to play."}
